title: Robert Skidelsky, RIP
subtitle: Here is one appreciation. His three-volume biography of Keynes (better than the one-volume condensation!) is in my opinion one of the very best books ever written, up there with Caro on Moses, etc. The post Robert Skidelsky, RIP appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION .
contentHtml:
Here is one appreciation.  His three-volume biography of Keynes (better than the one-volume condensation!) is in my opinion one of the very best books ever written, up there with Caro on Moses, etc.

The post Robert Skidelsky, RIP appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION.
